title: BAKER HOUSE MENS & BAKER HOUSE WOMENS - 211info
text: BAKER HOUSE RESIDENTIAL PROGRAM MEN'S & WOMEN'S BAKER HOUSE MENS & BAKER HOUSE WOMENS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Baker House is a 90-day residential treatment facility that provides detoxification for alcohol and drug addiction, including treatment for methamphetamine, opiates, alcohol and other drugs of abuse. Treatment is individualized and client centered, using evidence based practices. Treatment plans emphasize stages of change, motivational enhancement, cognitive thinking errors, relapse prevention planning, and individual, group, and family counseling. 3700 Midway Drive (Men) 3610 Midway Drive (Women) Baker City, OR 97814 Eligibility: Ages 18 and older Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 523-8320 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 523-8320 Baker House Men's Program Main phone (541) 523-6581 Baker House Women's Program Intake (541) 523-9016 [email protected] FAX (541) 523-4062 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call intake for information. Must complete drug and alcohol assessment to determine eligibility. FEES: Accepts OHP and private insurance. Offers sliding scale fees for uninsured patients. No one will be denied access to outpatient mental health or addictions services due to inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Proof of income if applying for sliding scale fees. AREA SERVED: Baker, Grant, Harney, Malheur, Union, and Wallowa Counties SITE HOURS: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: I-84 exit # 304 Services: Detoxification Residential Substance Use Disorder Treatment Facilities If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
